task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Contact Book** (Level 6)

Build a contacts API. Contacts table with name (required), email (must be valid email, unique), phone, notes. Full CRUD. POST /api/contacts validates email format and uniqueness. GET /api/contacts lists all.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Contacts table:
  name, required
  email, required, unique, email
  phone
  notes

# Your endpoints here

```

The app must pass these HTTP tests:
  - POST /api/contacts
final_source:
build for javascript backend

create a Contacts table:
  name, required
  email, required, unique, matches email
  phone
  notes

when user calls POST /api/contacts sending contact:
  validate contact:
    name is text, required
    email is text, required, matches email
  saved = save contact to Contacts
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/contacts:
  contacts = get all Contacts
  send back contacts
